faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in St. Albans?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in St. Albans typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, ensuring you understand all costs upfront.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in St. Albans homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in St. Albans homes take 4-6 hours for initial service. Heat treatments are completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my St. Albans home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to lethal levels. Chemical treatments require you to leave for 4-6 hours until surfaces dry. We provide detailed preparation instructions and can work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for children and pets in St. Albans?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-registered products and follow strict safety protocols. Children and pets can return home once treatments have dried, typically within 4-6 hours for chemical applications.
